description: Creates the properly formatted function call JSON with the math.hypot function name and extracted parameters

inputs.name: function_name
inputs.description: The target function name that should be called (math.hypot)

inputs.name: parameters
inputs.description: Dictionary containing the x, y, and optional z coordinate values for the function call

output.description: Returns the complete function call structure as: {"math.hypot": {"x": 4, "y": 5, "z": 0}} where the function name is the top-level key and parameters are nested underneath

workflow_spec.name: Hypotenuse Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parses user queries to extract parameters for the math.hypot function and generates the appropriate function call JSON
